SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration

Class MethodDeclaration

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration.JavaDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration.MethodDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClassTypeContainer, Member, Method, ProgramModelElement, Declaration, MemberDeclaration, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ParameterContainer, ProgramElement, TypeReferenceContainer, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, StatementContainer, VariableScope, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConstructorDeclaration
public class MethodDeclaration extends JavaDeclaration implements MemberDeclaration, TypeReferenceContainer, NamedProgramElement, ParameterContainer, Method, VariableScope
Method declaration. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

  • Field Details

    • returnType

      protected final TypeReference returnType
      The return type of the method.

    • voidComments

      protected final Comment[] voidComments
      In case of void return type: comments associated with the method.

    • name

      protected final ProgramElementName name
      The name of the method.

    • parameters

      protected final ImmutableArray<ParameterDeclaration> parameters
      Parameters of the method.

    • exceptions

      protected final Throws exceptions
      'throws' part of the method. Indicates which exceptions the method may throw. May be null.

    • body

      protected final StatementBlock body
      Body of the method. May be null, in which case the body is referenced in a file using JavaSourceElement.posInfo.

    • jmlModifiers

      protected final MethodDeclaration.JMLModifiers jmlModifiers
      JML modifiers of the referenced method. Includes e.g. pure.

    • parentIsInterfaceDeclaration

      protected final boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration
      this field stores if parent is an InterfaceDeclaration because we will be unable to walk the tree upwards to check this

  • Constructor Details

    • MethodDeclaration

      public MethodDeclaration(PositionInfo pi, List<Comment> comments, @NonNull ImmutableArray<Modifier> modArray, TypeReference returnType, Comment[] voidComments, ProgramElementName name, ImmutableArray<ParameterDeclaration> parameters, Throws exceptions, StatementBlock body, boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration, ImmutableList<TextualJMLConstruct> attachedJml)

    • MethodDeclaration

      public MethodDeclaration(ExtList children, boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration, Comment[] voidComments)
      Method declaration.
      Parameters:
      children - an ExtList of children. Must include: a TypeReference (as a reference to the return type), a ProgramElementName (as Name of the method), one or more ParameterDeclaration (as parameters of the declared method), optionally a StatementBlock (as body of the declared method), optionally a Throws to indicate exceptional behaviour
      parentIsInterfaceDeclaration - a boolean set true iff parent is an InterfaceDeclaration
      voidComments - in case of void return type: comments associated with the method

    • MethodDeclaration

      public MethodDeclaration(Modifier[] modifiers, TypeReference returnType, ProgramElementName name, ParameterDeclaration[] parameters, Throws exceptions, StatementBlock body, boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration)
      Method declaration.
      Parameters:
      modifiers - a modifier array
      returnType - a type reference.
      name - an identifier.
      parameters - a parameter declaration mutable list.
      exceptions - a throws.
      body - a statement block.
      parentIsInterfaceDeclaration - a boolean set true iff parent is an InterfaceDeclaration

    • MethodDeclaration

      public MethodDeclaration(Modifier[] modifiers, TypeReference returnType, ProgramElementName name, ImmutableArray<ParameterDeclaration> parameters, Throws exceptions, StatementBlock body, boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration)
      Method declaration.
      Parameters:
      modifiers - a modifier array
      returnType - a type reference.
      name - an identifier.
      parameters - a parameter declaration mutable list.
      exceptions - a throws.
      body - a statement block.
      parentIsInterfaceDeclaration - a boolean set true iff parent is an InterfaceDeclaration

  • Method Details

    • getProgramElementName

      public ProgramElementName getProgramElementName()
      Description copied from interface: NamedProgramElement
      Get identifier.
      Specified by:
      getProgramElementName in interface NamedProgramElement
      Returns:
      the identifier.

    • getFirstElement

      public @NonNull SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElement in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getLastElement

      public @NonNull SourceElement getLastElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs last in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getLastElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getLastElement in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the last source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getEndPosition()

    • getChildCount

      public int getChildCount()
      Description copied from interface: NonTerminalProgramElement
      Returns the number of children of this node.
      Specified by:
      getChildCount in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Specified by:
      getChildCount in interface SyntaxElement
      Returns:
      an int giving the number of children of this node

    • getChildAt

      public ProgramElement getChildAt(int index)
      Description copied from interface: NonTerminalProgramElement
      Returns the child at the specified index in this node's "virtual" child array.
      Specified by:
      getChildAt in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      index - an index into this node's "virtual" child array
      Returns:
      the program element at the given position

      Returns:

    • getParameterDeclarationAt

      public ParameterDeclaration getParameterDeclarationAt(int index)
      Description copied from interface: ParameterContainer
      Return the parameter declaration at the specified index in this node's "virtual" parameter declaration array.
      Specified by:
      getParameterDeclarationAt in interface ParameterContainer
      Parameters:
      index - an index for a parameter declaration.
      Returns:
      the parameter declaration with the given index.

      public TypeReference getTypeReference()
      Get return type.
      Returns:
      the type reference.

      public Comment[] getVoidComments()
      Get the "void comments" of this method declaration. Only non-null if the method has void return type.
      Returns:
      the "void comments"

      Test whether the declaration is public. Methods of interfaces are always public.

      public boolean isVarArgMethod()
      test whether the declaration is a method with a variable number of arguments (i.e. the ellipsis ...)
      Returns:
      true iff so

      public boolean isStrictFp()
      Description copied from class: JavaDeclaration
      Test whether the declaration is strictfp.

      Specified by:

      Overrides:

    • isAbstract

      public boolean isAbstract()
      Test whether the declaration is abstract. Methods of interfaces are always abstract.
      Specified by:
      isAbstract in interface Method
      Overrides:
      isAbstract in class JavaDeclaration
      Returns:
      true if this member is abstract, false otherwise.

    • isNative

      public boolean isNative()
      Test whether the declaration is native. Constructors are never native.
      Specified by:
      isNative in interface Method
      Overrides:
      isNative in class JavaDeclaration
      Returns:
      true if this method is native, false otherwise.
